blended.narrative: Crabbe Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 54°F.
Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
